title: allium hyalinum
intro: Allium hyalinum, also known as the white onion or crystal onion, is a species of flowering plant in the onion genus, native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Allium hyalinum include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and respiratory infections. Allium hyalinum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried flowers, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
